title: Bridge Essay: Molecular Mechanisms of Psilocybin and Implications for the Treatment of Depress

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Molecular Mechanisms of Psilocybin and Implications for the Treatment of Depression.**. CNS Drugs.. PMID: 34791625. DOI: 10.1007/s40263-021-00877-y. Therapeutic deficiencies with monoaminergic antidepressants invites the need to identify and develop novel rapid-acting antidepressants. Hitherto, ketamine and esketamine are identified as safe, well-tolerated rapid-acting antidepressants in adults with treatment-resistant depression, and also mitigate measures of suicidality.
